refnamediv.refpurpose: Returns TRUE if a n-D float precision bounding box (GIDX) intersects a geometry's (cached) n-D bounding box.

refsection.title: Description
refsection.para: The &&& operator returns TRUE if the n-D bounding box A intersects the cached n-D bounding box of geometry B, using float precision. This means that if A is a (double precision) box3d, it will be internally converted to a float precision 3D bounding box (GIDX)

note.para: This operator is intended to be used internally by BRIN indexes, more than by users.

refsection.para: Availability: 2.3.0 support for Block Range INdexes (BRIN) was introduced.

refsection.title: Examples
refsection.programlisting:
SELECT ST_3DMakeBox(ST_MakePoint(0,0,0), ST_MakePoint(2,2,2)) &&& ST_MakePoint(1,1,1) AS overlaps;
overlaps ---------- t (1 row)
